title: tragacantha helleri
intro: Tragacantha helleri, also known as Heller's milkvetch, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties that have been used to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and as a diuretic, due to its ability to stimulate urination and relieve symptoms of urinary tract infections. The herbal preparations of Tragacantha helleri include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from a range of health issues.
